discovery.cli: CLI tools your agent can invoke (one step from your host)
discovery.mcp: MCP capabilities one step from your setup

contribution.requires_auth: Authorization: Bearer <access_token> — get one with zero signup via POST /api/agentauth, or use a real Supabase session token

mcp.note: Distinct from /api/mcp-servers, which is a read-only REST catalog feed of MCP server listings.
